info.title: FamilyPlaces API
info.description: Versioned public contract for the FamilyPlaces catalogue.

429.description: RFC 9457 rate_limit_exceeded Problem Details with Retry-After.

get.summary: List published places in a map bounding box
get.description: Rejects antimeridian crossing and oversized bounding boxes.

429.description: RFC 9457 rate_limit_exceeded Problem Details with Retry-After.

get.description: Filters published places. Amenities use AND semantics. Radius is 1-100 km and page size is at most 50.
Checks process availability without contacting dependencies.

200.description: The API and required database are ready.

503.description: The required database dependency is unavailable.

get.description: Checks the required PostgreSQL dependency; optional Redis is excluded.

get.summary: Get favorite and visit states for a batch of places

post.summary: Record a visit to a place
